title: fix app review description parsing and news app links
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Reading the fine print
gist.blurb: Our app review bot learned how to read past the first line! App descriptions and links in Discord announcements are now much more accurate.
gist.summary: Fixed multi-line description parsing and string sanitization in the app review agent, and corrected how app links are displayed in Discord announcements.
gist.impact: Community app submissions will now display their full descriptions and correct links in our automated Discord announcements.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing reading glasses, looking at a long scroll of paper (app description) with a magnifying glass. The Nomnom creature is nearby, happily eating some buggy code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, examining a long scrolling document with a magnifying glass. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a crumpled piece of paper with buggy code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, examining a long scrolling document with a magnifying glass. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a crumpled piece of paper with buggy code. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
